General.Name: Atlinks Group Ltd
General.Description: Atlinks Group Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, and sells home and office telecommunication products through consumer retail chain stores, telecom operators, and distributors worldwide. It develops and distributes telephones, monitoring solutions, baby monitors, and conferencing phones under the Alcatel and Swissvoice brand names. The company also provides sound telephones, headphones, accessories, and mobile phones under the Amplicomms brand. In addition, it offers baby monitors, Wi-Fi cameras, and baby accessories under the Chillax brand. Further, the company provides APP development application and cloud services for internet of thing IoT devices, cloud server hosting, and data analytics solutions; research and development services; develops and trades in electrical equipment, including radio communication equipment; manages trademarks; and trades in baby care and electronic products. The company was incorporated in 2017 is based in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong. Atlinks Group Limited is a subsidiary of Eiffel Global Limited.
General.Address: Nan Fung Commercial Centre, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
